name: Undernutrition
desc: People with insufficient calorie and nutrient intake — hunger and underweight prevalence

name: Obesity
desc: People with excess calorie intake  —  obesity prevalence

name: Premature Mortality
desc: Premature deaths attributable to diet-related health risks

name: Food Expenditure
desc: Average consumer food expenditure — proxy for food affordability and cost burden

name: AFOLU GHG
desc: Agriculture forestry and land-use greenhouse gas emissions — climate forcing from food system

name: Global Warming
desc: Projected global mean surface temperature increase rel. to 1951-1980 — climate trajectory

name: Nitrogen Surplus
desc: Reactive nitrogen surplus in croplands and from livestock — air, water, atmospheric and soil pollution

name: Water Flow Violations
desc: Volume of river flow below environmental minimum — freshwater ecosystem health

name: Cropland Landscapes
desc: Biodiversity Intactness Index on cropland landscapes — landscapes with high cropping intensity

name: Hotspot Landscapes
desc: Biodiversity Intactness Index in biodiversity hotspot landscapes — most critical ecosystems

name: Croparea Diversity
desc: Shannon diversity index of harvested crop area — proxy for the diversity on croplands

name: Bioeconomy
desc: Value of bio-based products and services — contribution of agriculture beyond food

name: Production Costs
desc: Global food production costs — efficiency and price pressure on supply chains

name: Agric. Employment
desc: Agricultural labour demand — rural livelihoods and structural employment transition

name: Agric. Wages
desc: Average agricultural wages — farm worker income relative to 2020 baseline

name: Poverty
desc: People living below the international poverty line — impacted by food expenditures
